015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
023
024/**
025 * Utility classes and methods for the {@link RdfConfig @RdfConfig} annotation.
026 *
027 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
028 *    <li class='link'>{doc jmr.RdfDetails}
029 * </ul>
030 */
031@SuppressWarnings({
032   "java:S1612" // Lambdas used instead of method references throughout; conditional checks before delegation prevent direct method ref conversion
033})
034public class RdfConfigAnnotation {
035
036   private RdfConfigAnnotation() {}
037
038   /**
039    * Applies {@link RdfConfig} annotations to a {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.RdfParser.Builder}.
040    */
041   @SuppressWarnings({
042      "rawtypes" // Raw types required for reflective annotation application.
043   })
044   public static class ParserApply extends AnnotationApplier<RdfConfig,RdfParser.Builder> {
045
046      /**
047       * Constructor.
048       *
049       * @param vr The resolver for resolving values in annotations.
050       */
051      public ParserApply(VarResolverSession vr) {
052         super(RdfConfig.class, RdfParser.Builder.class, vr);
053      }
054
055      @Override
056      public void apply(AnnotationInfo<RdfConfig> ai, RdfParser.Builder b) {
057         RdfConfig a = ai.inner();
058
059         string(a.language()).ifPresent(x -> b.language(x));
060         string(a.juneauNs()).map(Namespace::of).ifPresent(x -> b.juneauNs(x));
061         string(a.juneauBpNs()).map(Namespace::of).ifPresent(x -> b.juneauBpNs(x));
062         string(a.collectionFormat()).map(RdfCollectionFormat::valueOf).ifPresent(x -> b.collectionFormat(x));
063         bool(a.looseCollections()).ifPresent(x -> b.looseCollections(x));
064         bool(a.trimWhitespace()).ifPresent(x -> b.trimWhitespace(x));
065         string(a.rdfxml_iriRules()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_iriRules(x));
066         string(a.rdfxml_errorMode()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_errorMode(x));
067         bool(a.rdfxml_embedding()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_embedding(x));
068         string(a.rdfxml_xmlBase()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_xmlbase(x));
069         bool(a.rdfxml_longId()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_longId(x));
070         bool(a.rdfxml_allowBadUris()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_allowBadUris(x));
071         string(a.rdfxml_relativeUris()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_relativeUris(x));
072         string(a.rdfxml_showXmlDeclaration()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_showXmlDeclaration(x));
073         bool(a.rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration(x));
074         integer(a.rdfxml_tab(), "rdfxml_tab").ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_tab(x));
075         string(a.rdfxml_attributeQuoteChar()).map(x -> x.charAt(0)).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_attributeQuoteChar(x));
076         string(a.rdfxml_blockRules()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_blockRules(x));
077         integer(a.n3_minGap(), "n3_minGap").ifPresent(x -> b.n3_minGap(x));
078         bool(a.n3_disableObjectLists()).ifPresent(x -> b.n3_disableObjectLists(x));
079         integer(a.n3_subjectColumn(), "n3_subjectColumn").ifPresent(x -> b.n3_subjectColumn(x));
080         integer(a.n3_propertyColumn(), "n3_propertyColumn").ifPresent(x -> b.n3_propertyColumn(x));
081         integer(a.n3_indentProperty(), "n3_indentProperty").ifPresent(x -> b.n3_indentProperty(x));
082         integer(a.n3_widePropertyLen(), "n3_widePropertyLen").ifPresent(x -> b.n3_widePropertyLen(x));
083         bool(a.n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri()).ifPresent(x -> b.n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri(x));
084         bool(a.n3_disableUsePropertySymbols()).ifPresent(x -> b.n3_disableUsePropertySymbols(x));
085         bool(a.n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings()).ifPresent(x -> b.n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings(x));
086         bool(a.n3_disableUseDoubles()).ifPresent(x -> b.n3_disableUseDoubles(x));
087      }
088   }
089
090   /**
091    * Applies {@link RdfConfig} annotations to a {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.RdfSerializer.Builder}.
092    */
093   @SuppressWarnings({
094      "rawtypes" // Raw types required for reflective annotation application.
095   })
096   public static class SerializerApply extends AnnotationApplier<RdfConfig,RdfSerializer.Builder> {
097
098      /**
099       * Constructor.
100       *
101       * @param vr The resolver for resolving values in annotations.
102       */
103      public SerializerApply(VarResolverSession vr) {
104         super(RdfConfig.class, RdfSerializer.Builder.class, vr);
105      }
106
107      @Override
108      public void apply(AnnotationInfo<RdfConfig> ai, RdfSerializer.Builder b) {
109         RdfConfig a = ai.inner();
110
111         string(a.language()).ifPresent(x -> b.language(x));
112         string(a.juneauNs()).map(Namespace::of).ifPresent(x -> b.juneauNs(x));
113         string(a.juneauBpNs()).map(Namespace::of).ifPresent(x -> b.juneauBpNs(x));
114         bool(a.disableUseXmlNamespaces()).ifPresent(x -> b.disableUseXmlNamespaces(x));
115         string(a.collectionFormat()).map(RdfCollectionFormat::valueOf).ifPresent(x -> b.collectionFormat(x));
116         bool(a.looseCollections()).ifPresent(x -> b.looseCollections(x));
117         bool(a.addBeanTypes()).ifPresent(x -> b.addBeanTypesRdf(x));
118         bool(a.addLiteralTypes()).ifPresent(x -> b.addLiteralTypes(x));
119         bool(a.addRootProperty()).ifPresent(x -> b.addRootProperty(x));
120         bool(a.disableAutoDetectNamespaces()).ifPresent(x -> b.disableAutoDetectNamespaces(x));
121         strings(a.namespaces()).map(Namespace::createArray).ifPresent(x -> b.namespaces(x));
122         string(a.rdfxml_iriRules()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_iriRules(x));
123         string(a.rdfxml_errorMode()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_errorMode(x));
124         bool(a.rdfxml_embedding()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_embedding(x));
125         string(a.rdfxml_xmlBase()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_xmlbase(x));
126         bool(a.rdfxml_longId()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_longId(x));
127         bool(a.rdfxml_allowBadUris()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_allowBadUris(x));
128         string(a.rdfxml_relativeUris()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_relativeUris(x));
129         string(a.rdfxml_showXmlDeclaration()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_showXmlDeclaration(x));
130         bool(a.rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration(x));
131         integer(a.rdfxml_tab(), "rdfxml_tab").ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_tab(x));
132         string(a.rdfxml_attributeQuoteChar()).map(x -> x.charAt(0)).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_attributeQuoteChar(x));
133         string(a.rdfxml_blockRules()).ifPresent(x -> b.rdfxml_blockRules(x));
134         integer(a.n3_minGap(), "n3_minGap").ifPresent(x -> b.n3_minGap(x));
135         bool(a.n3_disableObjectLists()).ifPresent(x -> b.n3_disableObjectLists(x));
136         integer(a.n3_subjectColumn(), "n3_subjectColumn").ifPresent(x -> b.n3_subjectColumn(x));
137         integer(a.n3_propertyColumn(), "n3_propertyColumn").ifPresent(x -> b.n3_propertyColumn(x));
138         integer(a.n3_indentProperty(), "n3_indentProperty").ifPresent(x -> b.n3_indentProperty(x));
139         integer(a.n3_widePropertyLen(), "n3_widePropertyLen").ifPresent(x -> b.n3_widePropertyLen(x));
140         bool(a.n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri()).ifPresent(x -> b.n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri(x));
141         bool(a.n3_disableUsePropertySymbols()).ifPresent(x -> b.n3_disableUsePropertySymbols(x));
142         bool(a.n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings()).ifPresent(x -> b.n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings(x));
143         bool(a.n3_disableUseDoubles()).ifPresent(x -> b.n3_disableUseDoubles(x));
144      }
145   }
146}
